channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: SoftBank shares plunge over 11% amid broader tech sell-off
item.description: Shares of SoftBank fell 11% following an overnight sell-off in the U.S. market on the back of wider profit taking in the tech sector.

item.title: S&P 500 futures fall after index snaps 9-day win streak amid rising Middle East tensions: Live updates
item.description: Rising oil prices and Treasury yields weighed all three major indexes lower on Wednesday.

item.title: SpaceX targets $135 IPO price at valuation of $1.77 trillion
item.description: The valuation would make Elon Musk's company the seventh-biggest in the U.S., above Tesla, which has a market cap of about $1.6 trillion.

item.title: Finland's president says EU should expand to 40 states — including Canada
item.description: Finnish President Alexander Stubb said the European Union needs to expand to project power on the global stage.

item.title: This lagging payroll stock is in comeback mode as it completes bottoming process
item.description: Frank Cappelleri looks at this payroll stock that sits between the software and industrial sectors.

item.title: ‘Buying stuff like it’s going out of fashion’: Biotech M&A on track for best year since pre-Covid
item.description: Driven by looming patent cliffs, newly buoyant public markets, and Big Pharma's race to beef up their pipelines, dealmaking in 2026 is off to a strong start.

item.title: Sellers are pulling homes off the market at the fastest pace since 2020
item.description: Frustrated sellers are pulling their homes off the market at an increasingly high pace, as demand weakens and bidding wars wane.

item.title: Bitcoin's high-conviction holders are turning into sellers as the crypto's price hits new lows
item.description: In the past two days, bitcoin's highest-conviction holders have sold about $2.4 billion in bitcoin.

item.title: Elon Musk's net worth poised to sail past $1 trillion in SpaceX IPO
item.description: Based on SpaceX's updated IPO prospectus, Elon Musk owns shares in the company worth over $866 billion.

item.title: Inside India newsletter: Why Taiwan and South Korea's stock markets have surged past India within a week
item.description: The Indian equity market is losing favour with global investors, as its domestic consumption story weakens and the country lags in AI.

item.title: Hilton, Becerra lead in tight primary race for California governor; Bass ahead in LA mayoral race
item.description: Republican television commentator Steve Hilton and Democratic former cabinet secretary Xavier Becerra took the early lead in the open primary race for governor.

item.title: Josh Turek wins Iowa Democratic Senate primary that could shape Democrats' path to Senate majority
item.description: Iowa's Senate primary where state Rep. Josh Turek beat state Sen. Zach Wahls could be critical as Democrats look to take back power in Congress.

item.title: Jim Cramer warns excess supply could be the next biggest threat to the bull market
item.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer warned that a growing wave of AI-related capital raises could overwhelm investor demand and create a near-term headwind for stocks.

item.title: Beware SpaceX buyers: Major IPOs are typically a rough ride in the first year
item.description: A review of 30 major IPOs over the past 15 years shows companies tend to have a rough start, according to Truist Wealth.

item.title: Amazon engineers in Seattle slam employer for building AI data centers while laying off 30,000 staffers
item.description: Amazon engineers called out their employer for conducting mass layoffs while it commits to spending $200 billion this year on AI infrastructure.

item.title: Flesh-eating screwworm is confirmed in the U.S., officials say
Asia-Pacific markets fall on renewed Middle East tensions
item.description: Asia-Pacific markets open lower amid renewed tensions between Iran and the U.S. and worries that the conflict may keep inflation elevated.

item.title: GOP Sen. Tillis slams Trump intelligence pick Pulte: 'Don't think he has a prayer'
item.description: Pulte is widely viewed as a Trump loyalist who has targeted the president's political foes during his tenure leading the housing regulatory agency.

item.title: Historic stock rally faces key test
item.description: Two key tech companies reporting earnings after the bell could determine the next move higher or lower.

item.title: Honeywell's Quantinuum raises $1.68 billion in U.S. IPO as quantum computing heats up, Reuters reports
item.description: Honeywell's Quantinuum said on Wednesday it had raised $1.68 billion in its U.S. initial public offering after pricing shares at $60 apiece.

item.title: What's behind Palo Alto's earnings sell-off — and how to proceed
item.description: The stock was red hot into the earnings report.

item.title: Save on your next trip with these hotel booking apps
item.description: To score the best deals on hotels and lodging, use these tools to search and save.

item.title: Israel and Lebanon agree to implement ceasefire
item.description: Lebanon and Israel have ​agreed to ​the implementation ​of a ceasefire, according to a joint statement with the United States ⁠released ‌by the State Department ⁠on Wednesday following negotiations in Washington.

item.title: CrowdStrike is a buy, just not yet. Here's why
item.description: On top of the beat-and-raise, CrowdStrike announced a 4-for-1 stock split. But short-term thinkers sold the stock.

item.title: Netanyahu says he and Trump have 'tactical disagreements' but agree overall amid Iran war
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu sat down with CNBC's Sara Eisen for an exclusive interview about the Iran war and U.S.-Israeli relations.

item.title: Why we're raising our price target on Broadcom despite its post-earnings sell-off
item.description: Broadcom's AI business will continue to shine and outpace the conservative forecast.

item.title: A classic strategy that could yield big dividends
item.description: Packaging Corp of America (PKG) is an old-school, brick-and-mortar industrial business.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Exxon Mobil, GameStop, Palo Alto Networks, Blackstone & more
item.description: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.

item.title: Bessent says he is performing IRS commissioner duties amid Trump tax settlement scrutiny
item.description: Democrats pressed the Treasury chief over whether other taxpayers affected by the leak that included Trump's tax returns would receive similar treatment.

item.title: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: The S&P 500 snapped a nine-day winning streak on Wednesday as rising Treasury yields and oil prices kept stocks under pressure.
